title: Operational Bulletins 2010 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational Bulletins 2010
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 184 – February 8, 2010 (Modified) Guidelines for Writing Part 2 Refusal Letters for Citizenship Adoption Application
- OB 256 – December 23, 2010 (Expired) Monitoring Conditions for Quebec-Selected Entrepreneurs
- OB 259 – December 21, 2010 Temporary Resident Visa Application Form Transition Date
- OB 258 – December 16, 2010 (Expired) Guidelines Following the Recent Elections Results in Ivory Coast
- OB 252 – December 2, 2010 Regulatory and Administrative Changes to the Federal Immigrant Investor Program
- OB 246 – November 30, 2010 (Expired) Implementation of the New Language Screening Tool in the Citizenship Process
- OB 254 – November 30, 2010 Modified Temporary Resident Visa Application Form
- OB 229 – November 24, 2010 (Expired) Pilot Project for Foreign Spouses and Dependent Children of High-Skilled Canadians or Permanent Residents Returning to Work in Ontario
- OB 251 – November 24, 2010 (Expired) Examination of Members of the Provincial Nominee Class at Ports of Entry and CIC Inland Offices
- OB 253 – November 24, 2010 Visa requirement for ordinary passport holders in Taiwan
- OB 250 – November 22, 2010 (Expired) Deeming Permanent Residence for Registered Indians Applying for Citizenship
- OB 194 – November 18, 2010 (Modified) (Expired) Clarification on the eligibility of combined programs for the Post-Graduation Work Permit Program and the last semester of study
- OB 249 – November 15, 2010 End of Haiti Special Measures
- OB 242 – October 21, 2010 (Expired) Policy for Processing Extensions and/or Changes to Work Permit Conditions for International Experience Canada (IEC) and Participants in Other Youth Exchange Programs
- OB 244 – October 13, 2010 Amendments to the Citizenship Regulations and Updated Guidelines Regarding the Citizenship Test
- OB 241 – October 12, 2010 (Expired) New Temporary Resident Visa Application Form
- OB 223 – October 8, 2010 (Modified) Extension of the China Transit Trial to September 30, 2012
- OB 243 – October 1, 2010 Assessing Compliance with the Residency Obligation for Employment Outside Canada
- OB 240 – October 1, 2010 Rehabilitation Applications — Change to Delegated Authorities for Decision Making
- OB 152A – September 30, 2010 (Expired) Limited Validity Period for Labour Market Opinions
- OB 225A – September 30, 2010 Modified processing instructions for Information Technology work permit applications (software pilot) received prior to October 1, 2010
- OB 152 – September 17, 2010 (Expired) Limited Validity Period for Labour Market Opinions
- OB 231 – September 1, 2010 Update to the Designated Country/Territory List
- OB 230 – September 1, 2010 New Labour Market Opinion ( LMO ) Exemption – Foreign Medical Residents and Medical Research Fellows
- OB 226 – August 25, 2010 Biometric Information Sharing Under the High Value Data Sharing Protocol
- OB 232 – August 20, 2010 (Expired) Live-in Caregiver Program: Revised In-Canada Medical Examination Procedures
- OB 228 – August 17, 2010 Visa Office Referred ( VOR ) and Joint Assistance Sponsorships ( JAS ) for Refugees – New Templates and Instructions
- OB 225 – August 5, 2010 (Expired) Modified processing instructions for Information Technology work permit applications (software pilot) received prior to October 1 st , 2010
- OB 223 – July 30, 2010 Extension of the China Transit Trial to September 30, 2010
- OB 221 – July 19, 2010 Passport Requirements for citizens of Lithuania and Poland
- OB 179B – June 29, 2010 (Modified) (Expired) Special measures for Haiti: Permanent resident non-adoption cases
- OB 179A – June 29, 2010 (Expired) Special Measures in Response to the Earthquake in Haiti
- OB 219 – June 28, 2010 (Expired) Ministerial Instructions and Canadian Experience Class applications
- OB 218 – June 28, 2010 (Expired) Ministerial Instructions and Federal Skilled Worker Class Applications
- OB 213 – June 28, 2010 (Expired) Federal Immigrant Investor Program Applications: Administrative Pause
- OB 146 – June 28, 2010 Alberta Pilot Project for Spouses and Common-Law Partners of Long-Haul Truck Drivers
- OB 123 – June 28, 2010 Pilot Project for Working-Age Dependent Children of Workers Destined to Ontario
- OB 122 – June 28, 2010 Pilot Project for Working-Age Dependent Children of Workers Destined to Alberta
- OB 217 – June 25, 2010 Refugee Claim Ineligibility under Paragraph 101(1)( d ) of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act
- OB 214 – June 23, 2010 R186( s ) – Work permit exemptions for vessel crew members
- OB 194 – June 11, 2010 (Modified) Clarification on the eligibility of combined programs for the Post-Graduation Work Permit Program and the last semester of study
- OB 210 – June 4, 2010 (Expired) End of Simplified Entry Process for Information Technology ( IT ) specialists – Temporary Foreign Worker Program
- OB 212 – June 1, 2010 New Version of IMM 1262 ( Acknowledgement of Conditions )
- OB 194 – June 1, 2010 Clarification on the eligibility of combined programs for the Post-Graduation Work Permit Program and the last semester of study
- OB 179B –May 17 , 2010 (Modified) Special measures for Haiti: Permanent resident non-adoption cases
- OB 205 — May 10, 2010 (Expired) Processing applications submitted with the United States Passport Card
- OB 201 – April 16, 2010 (Expired) Guidelines for individuals affected by the April 14, 2010 volcano
- OB 195 – April 16, 2010 (Expired) Emergency referrals to local offices for work permits
- OB 197 – April 12, 2010 (Expired) Establishing parentage for citizenship purposes where surrogacy/reproductive technology is involved
- OB 193 – April 12, 2010 Application of the 90 day bridging period for study permits and off-campus work permits and clarification of full-time versus part-time studies in the final academic session before graduation for issuance of off-campus work permits
- OB 188 – April 9, 2010 Use of Section 25(1) of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act on sponsored applications of dependent children affected by the C-37 first generation limitation on citizenship by descent
- OB 198 – April 1, 2010 (Expired) Transfer of Economic Class Applications from Islamabad to London
- OB 192 – April 1, 2010 (Expired) Regulatory and administrative changes to the Live-in Caregiver Program
- OB 179B – April 1, 2010 (Expired) Special measures for Haiti: Permanent resident non-adoption cases

- OB 187 – February 19, 2010 Amendment of application forms for temporary and permanent residence to incorporate a question on official languages
- OB 183 – February 8, 2010 Supplementary policy guidance on assessing the severing of a pre-existing legal parent-child relationship for grants of citizenship under A5.1(1) or A5.1(2)
- OB 180 – January 22, 2010 (Expired) Section 11 of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations ( IRPR ) and applications for permanent residence in the Federal Skilled Worker ( FSW ) class
- OB 182 – January 20, 2010 Use of new citizenship promotional products and directive for destruction of all old promotional material
- OB 177 – January 18, 2010 Democratic Republic of the Congo passports
- OB 173 – January 8, 2010 (Expired) Ministerial Instructions - Clarification on continuous full-time experience and break in continuity of employment
- OB 167 – January 5, 2010 Procedures for transferring files for in-Canada applications for permanent residence
